title: chytroma rorida
side_effects: Chytroma rorida can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. In some cases, excessive consumption can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, it may cause interactions with certain medications, affecting blood pressure or blood sugar levels. Improper use of the plant has also been linked to headaches and fatigue in some individuals.
